pace.advice: Stay steady. Keep daily output near your 30-day average.

consistency.advice: Recent week is below baseline. Add one extra session block this week.

risk.advice: Recent drop is steep. Rebuild with small daily targets this week.

pro_dev.name: One Lead Metric
pro_dev.why: Top performers anchor behavior to a single pace number each day.
pro_dev.action: Hit or exceed required pace: 83.96 reps/day.

pro_dev.name: Consistency Before Intensity
pro_dev.why: Sustained frequency compounds faster than occasional spikes.

pro_dev.name: Progressive Overload With Guardrails
pro_dev.why: Improvement comes from controlled increases, not random jumps.
pro_dev.action: Keep week-over-week volume change between 0% and +20% when possible.

coach_note: This week: rebuild consistency. Add one extra training day and match your 30-day average.
